2026/05/18 21:09:00.740611120 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/05/18 21:09:00.740632250 {

2026/05/18 21:09:00.740740321 new$version <- version
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740741163 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740756131 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740756922 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740771339 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740772140 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740787259 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740788060 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740801235 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740802046 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740816493 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740817415 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740833645 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740834407 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740867116 new$colormodel <- colormodel

2026/05/18 21:09:00.740893377 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740894679 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740911570 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740912512 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740928662 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740929464 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740944712 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740945594 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740964799 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||

2026/05/18 21:09:00.741009651 "default"))
2026/05/18 21:09:00.741032481 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/18 21:09:00.741034845 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/18 21:09:00.741053931 }
2026/05/18 21:09:00.741054883 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/05/18 21:09:00.741071013 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/18 21:09:00.741119874 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/18 21:09:00.741136324 }
2026/05/18 21:09:00.741137226 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/18 21:09:00.741151209 }
2026/05/18 21:09:00.741152181 else if (length(family) == 1L) {

2026/05/18 21:09:00.741212213 old$family <- family
2026/05/18 21:09:00.741228103 }

2026/05/18 21:09:00.740756131 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740756922 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740771339 new$encoding <- encoding

2026/05/18 21:09:00.740816493 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740817415 if (!missing(pagecentre))

2026/05/18 21:09:00.740929464 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740944712 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740945594 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740964799 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/18 21:09:00.740965681 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/05/18 21:09:00.740985608 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/18 21:09:00.741008429 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/18 21:09:00.741009651 "default"))
2026/05/18 21:09:00.741032481 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/18 21:09:00.741034845 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/18 21:09:00.741053931 }
2026/05/18 21:09:00.741054883 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/05/18 21:09:00.741071013 if (!missing(family)) {

2026/05/18 21:09:00.741136324 }

2026/05/18 21:09:00.741151209 }
